name: njust-ai-workspace-schema
displayName: NJUST AI CJ workspace settings schema
description: Declares njust-ai.* workspace keys so .vscode/settings.json validates without installing the full extension in this window.

njust-ai.cloudAgent.deferredProtocol.description: Use deferred execution protocol (start → tool execution → resume loop).

njust-ai.cloudAgent.compileLoop.enabled.description: Enable compile feedback loop after Cloud Agent writes code.
